to: make an activity direction in connection with that provision of the child arrangements order.

on the same occasion, — (a) make an activity direction under subsection (2B), and (b) dispose finally of the proceedings as they relate to failure to comply with the provision in connection with which the activity direction is made.
make an activity direction under section 11A(2) in connection with any matter mentioned in section 11A(1A)

conditions.text: there is a dispute as regards the provision about that matter that the court is considering whether to make in the proceedings.

to: make an activity direction requiring an individual who is a child to take part in an activity

conditions.text: the individual is a parent of the child in relation to whom the court is considering provision about a matter mentioned in section 11A(1A).

to: make an activity activity direction in connection with the making, variation or discharge of a child arrangements order

conditions.text: the child arrangements order is, or would if made be, an excepted order.

to: make an activity direction in relation to an individual

conditions.text: the individual is habitually resident in England and Wales

to: impose a condition (an "activity condition") requiring an individual falling within subsection (3) to take part in an activity that would, in the court's opinion, help to establish, maintain or improve the involvement in the life of the child concerned of— (a) that individual, or (b) another individual who is a party to the proceedings.

be varied so as to impose a condition (an "activity condition") requiring an individual falling within subsection (3) to take part in an activity that would, in the court's opinion, help to establish, maintain or improve the involvement in the life of the child concerned of— (a) that individual, or (b) another individual who is a party to the proceedings.
specify the activity and the person providing the activity.
